overall.description: A first-person walk through a suburban Los Santos neighborhood at sunset in GTA V. The camera moves from a parking lot along sidewalks and dirt paths, passing commercial buildings, a church, and approaching Mount Chiliad in the distance. Sparse traffic and warm orange skies dominate the atmosphere.

large mature oak tree with dense foliage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a parking lot next to a suburban road at dusk. The camera walks past a parked white station wagon and yellow bollards along the sidewalk. A commercial building with blue neon lights stands across the street, and a dark sedan drives past on the road around the 8-second mark.

events.description: moves from paved sidewalk onto dirt and grass beside the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the unpaved dirt path beside the road, passing wooden fences and utility poles

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and grass path running parallel to the road
wooden slat fence bordering a property
large mountain silhouette becoming visible against the orange sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from pavement to a dirt path alongside the road. Wooden fences line the left side while the right side opens to the street. The mountain becomes visible in the distance against the deep orange sunset, and the commercial building with neon lights recedes into the background.

segments.scene_description: Returning to paved sidewalk, the camera passes a gas station and approaches a church building. The mountain dominates the right side of the frame against the orange sky. A chain-link fence runs along the left, and a station wagon drives past on the road as the camera nears an intersection with crosswalk markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential intersection with school zone markings

events.description: turns left at the intersection, crossing the white crosswalk lines
passes over large white stop sign and school zone markings painted on the road surface

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and continuing along the curved residential road, passing the church

large white stop sign painted on the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at the intersection, crossing white crosswalk lines. The church recedes into the background as the view opens to a curved residential street. Tall cypress trees and residential fences line the road, and the camera passes over a large stop sign painted on the asphalt before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a suburban neighborhood that transitions from a commercial area into a quiet residential street under a deep orange sunset. It begins in a parking lot beside a suburban road, passing a white station wagon and yellow bollards while a commercial building with blue neon lights glows across the street. As the camera moves from the pavement onto a dirt path lined with wooden fences, the neon lights recede and the distant silhouette of a mountain emerges against the darkening sky. The scene then shifts back to a paved sidewalk, passing a gas station and a church building while a station wagon drives past toward an intersection. Finally, the camera turns left across white crosswalk lines, leaving the church behind to follow a curved residential road lined with tall cypress trees and fences, passing over a large stop sign painted on the asphalt.
